title: Docker Multi-Environment Architecture
subtitle: Scalable Development Environment System
description: A modular Docker-based multi-stack environment designed to simplify development workflows across PHP, Node.js and Python ecosystems.
problem: Managing multiple development stacks locally often leads to dependency conflicts and inconsistent environments.
solution: A structured container-based architecture that isolates environments while maintaining consistent configuration.
scalability: The system allows quick environment replication, easy onboarding, and production-aligned configuration for future scaling.
